data.title: Russia Weighs Bitcoin Reserve As Deputy Warns Sanctions Leave Crypto 'Only Instrument For Trade' Amid Trump's Pro-Bitcoin Push
data.description: Russia is considering establishing a strategic Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) reserve amid growing tensions with Western financial systems and following President-elect Donald Trump‘s pro-cryptocurrency stance in the United States.

data.title: Tim Kuniskis To Return To Lead Ram Trucks Days After Stellantis CEO's Departure: Report
data.description: Former Stellantis executive Tim Kuniskis is reportedly returning to the company to lead its Ram Trucks brand merely days after Carlos Tavares resigned as company CEO.

data.title: Dogecoin Can Touch $18 If Things 'Go Wild,' Says Influential Crypto Trader: 'Thankful For The Dip And Will Buy More'
data.description: Popular cryptocurrency trader and analyst Ali Martinez took Dogecoin's (CRYPTO: DOGE) fall in stride, saying on Monday that he would use it to buy more of the leading meme coin.

data.title: S&P 500, Nasdaq Retreat From Record Highs As Nvidia Declines Over Chinese Antitrust Concerns: Fear & Greed Index Remains In 'Neutral' Zone
Oracle, United Natural Foods And 3 Stocks To Watch Heading Into Tuesday
